name: hyperliquid
title: Hyperliquid
description: Browse Hyperliquid perp markets, track your positions and PnL, and pin live prices to your menu bar — all read-only.
author: insuline

commands.name: markets
commands.title: Markets
commands.subtitle: Hyperliquid
commands.description: Browse Hyperliquid perpetual markets with live prices and candlestick charts.

commands.name: positions
commands.title: My Positions
commands.subtitle: Hyperliquid
commands.description: View your open Hyperliquid perp positions, PnL and liquidation prices.

commands.name: manage-wallets
commands.title: Manage Wallets
commands.subtitle: Hyperliquid
commands.description: Add, label and remove the wallet addresses you want to track.

commands.name: prices
commands.title: Prices
commands.subtitle: Hyperliquid
commands.description: Show your favorite tickers and their 24h change in the menu bar.

preferences.name: defaultInterval
preferences.title: Default Chart Interval
preferences.description: Candle interval used when opening a market's detail view.

preferences.name: liqAlertDistance
preferences.title: Liquidation Alert Distance
preferences.description: Flag a position as at-risk when the mark price is within this percentage of its liquidation price.
